title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: tzdata bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for tzdata is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The tzdata packages contain data files with rules for various time zones.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update to tzdata-2025c: Updated leap seconds files to extend the expiration date of the leap second data. (JIRA:RHEL-135156, JIRA:RHEL-135158, JIRA:RHEL-135159)

full_text:
An update for tzdata is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The tzdata packages contain data files with rules for various time zones.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Update to tzdata-2025c: Updated leap seconds files to extend the expiration date of the leap second data. (JIRA:RHEL-135156, JIRA:RHEL-135158, JIRA:RHEL-135159)
